title: T-016 — LP create + numbering sequence service
prompt:
# T-016 — LP create + numbering sequence service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §6.3 (FR-WH-001).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Provide `createLicensePlate(input)` service that allocates the next LP number per (tenant, warehouse) sequence and inserts a row.

## Implementation contract
In `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-create.ts` expose async function returning created LP. Use a Postgres sequence `lp_seq_{tenant_id}_{warehouse_id}` created lazily, formatted with `warehouse_settings.lp_number_prefix` + zero-padded `lp_number_sequence_length`. Allow manual override when `allow_manual_lp_number=true`. Insert audit fields. Emit nothing here (T-047 emits).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-create.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-create.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two consecutive calls for tenant A / warehouse X, when service runs, then second LP_number is exactly first+1 padded to length.
2. Given allow_manual_lp_number=true and operator passes 'LP-CUSTOM-1', when service runs, then row is created with lp_number='LP-CUSTOM-1'.
3. Given the same custom number is reused, when service runs, then it raises a unique-violation error from V-WH-LP-001.

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-create.test.ts with two fixtures (auto sequence and manual override + duplicate).
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-create`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass the sequence (race condition).
- Do not skip RLS (must run inside transaction with app.tenant_id set).
- Do not emit outbox events here.

pipeline_inputs.description: createLicensePlate service allocating LP number via per-(tenant, warehouse) sequence.
pipeline_inputs.details: Lazy sequence creation; padded format from warehouse_settings; manual override path; unique-violation surfaced as 409. Audit columns set; outbox emission deferred to T-047.
acceptance_criteria: Given two consecutive calls for tenant A warehouse X, when run, then second LP_number = first+1 padded to length
Given allow_manual_lp_number=true and 'LP-CUSTOM-1', when run, then row persists with that value
Given duplicate manual number, when run, then service raises a unique-violation error
test_strategy: RED: lp-create.test.ts covers auto-sequence and manual override + duplicate
